command:
echo "=== BEFORE ==="
cat /etc/resolv.conf
echo "--- dhcpcd.conf nohook present? ---"
grep "nohook resolv.conf" /etc/dhcpcd.conf 2>/dev/null || echo "NOT present yet"

echo ""
echo "=== APPLYING OPTION A ==="
# 1. Backup current resolv.conf and dhcpcd.conf
sudo cp /etc/resolv.conf /etc/resolv.conf.bak-$(date +%Y%m%d)
sudo cp /etc/dhcpcd.conf /etc/dhcpcd.conf.bak-$(date +%Y%m%d) 2>/dev/null

# 2. Add nohook resolv.conf if not present
grep -q "nohook resolv.conf" /etc/dhcpcd.conf 2>/dev/null || echo "nohook resolv.conf" | sudo tee -a /etc/dhcpcd.conf

# 3. Write correct resolv.conf
echo -e "nameserver 8.8.8.8\nnameserver 8.8.4.4\nnameserver 1.1.1.1" | sudo tee /etc/resolv.conf

# 4. Restart dhcpcd
sudo systemctl restart dhcpcd
sleep 3

echo ""
echo "=== AFTER ==="
cat /etc/resolv.conf
echo "--- dhcpcd status ---"
systemctl is-active dhcpcd
echo "--- network still up? (ping gateway) ---"
ping -c 2 -W 2 192.168.0.1 | tail -2
echo "--- DNS resolution works? ---"
nslookup github.com 2>&1 | head -5 || getent hosts github.com
echo "--- internet reachable? ---"
ping -c 2 -W 2 8.8.8.8 | tail -2
